LANDLORDS

Award-Winning ''ESTATE AGENTS BIRMINGHAM''

Welcome to our distinguished Estate and Lettings Agency, renowned as an industry leader for over 14 years. We take pride in being the boutique Estate Agency that blends a fervour for people and property. Our accomplished team adopts a multidisciplinary approach, specialising in residential and commercial property sales, lettings, and management.

With strategically positioned offices in Birmingham City Centre, Edgbaston, Sutton Coldfield and Jewellery Quarter, we are optimally situated to cater to the dynamic property market in these areas. Whether you are contemplating the sale, letting, or management of your property, our dedicated team is poised to guide you through every step of the process, ensuring a superior and comprehensive service.

I want to know more

WHAT IS YOUR PROPERTY WORTH?

BOOK A VALUATION

WHY OUR CUSTOMERS US

Read what our honest customers are saying about our service

Incredibly Well Connected

I highly recommend LV through whom I recently sold my Property. Despite a number of hiccups (none at all being LVs fault) they went over and beyond to help with any of my queries and took a lot of the work off my plate, even in dealing with solicitors etc. Andy in particular is an absolute superstar and goes above and beyond for all of her clients in a friendly, professional and incredibly efficient manner. LV are incredibly well connected and marketed and sold my flat in a way other estate agents just could not do. Would not hesitate to re-use them.

Aadhithya Anbahan

Great Team

We were provided an outstanding service from this estate agent in Birmingham. Always helpful, honest and very knowledgeable. The whole team from the start have been responsive and reliable which helped create an excellent line of communication throughout the sale. Lv property managed to sell our property in Birmingham city centre at the asking price, dispite the market conditions which we were very grateful for.

Charlotte Vile

efficiency & professionalism

LV have worked with me throughout the purchase of my new home and I cannot thank them enough for their efficiency and professionalism. In particular I’d like to thank Sophie and Aimee who have helped me survive the process of buying a house! Aimee has been a great mediator between solicitors and her communication with keeping me up to date was fantastic, both herself and Sophie were always responsive to my many requests. I would definitely use LV properties again and highly recommend. Thank you

Jennie Coy

Thank You

Thank you to Stacey for dealing with my complicated requests, the property market is crazy busy lately and Stacey done all she could to cater for my needs and find me a property at such short notice, nothing was too much for her to deal with and her knowledge on the City centre was second to none. Thank you Stacey.

Sonia Hewitt

IN SAFE HANDS

I am currently letting my property with LV, my agent is Stacey and she is enthusiastic, helpful, understanding and full of energy. Shes very responsive to phone calls and emails and i feel as if i am in safe hands. Im very happy with the service from Stacey and LV.

Jules R

Informative & Honest

I viewed a property with Stacey from LV property and was very happy with the service and professionalism I received, Stacey was very smiley, informative and honest and that in its self lead me to use LV as my agents let alone the beautiful property I was lucky enough to secure. Thankyou very much, I look forward to move in day.

Kayleigh Mills

Highly Proactive

Found us a tenants almost immediately upon completion of our purchases. Very prompt in responding to our enquiries & remitting the rent. They have also proven to be most proactive in ensuring our property is always occupied with minimum voids. Are in particular has always been on the ball in terms of property management and responding all enquries very promptly. Highly recommend to all landlords.

Simon Munn

SOLD WITHIN 4 WEEKS

We were on the market with two agents before switching to LV and have been very impressed. Very professional, and very responsive too - they've kept us updated throughout and have now found us a buyer for our property within 4 weeks! Reasonably priced too. Would definitely use them again if we were selling.

Joyce Horner

Exceeded Expectations

Sold my two investment properties in two weeks at the asking price. Jas is an easy guy to deal with and exceeded all of my expectations, I called out 3 agents and they all valued my property between £15K-20K below what they actually ended up selling it for. They simply did what they said they would do, the whole process with the solicitors wasn't the easiest but I can honestly the team at LV made it easy by swiftly following up and constantly pushing the solicitors until we achieved completion.

Mathew Bettison

In Good Hands

From the moment I started working with Andrew and Ajay, I knew I was in good hands. They have been exceptional estate agents who provided personalized and dedicated service. Their attention to detail and communication throughout the buying process made it smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend them to anyone in the market for a property.

John Steele

Attentive service

I recently had the pleasure of working with LV property to sell my home, and I couldn't be happier with the service I received. From the initial consultation to the final sale, Andrew Ball was professional, knowledgeable, and attentive to my needs.

Overall, I would highly recommend LV to anyone looking for a top-notch estate agent. Their professionalism, expertise, and dedication to their clients truly set them apart. Thank you, Andrew Ball & Ajay Singh for making my home sale a success!

Harjinder S

Smooth and stress free

As an estate agent, they have gone above and beyond to make the process as smooth and stress-free as possible.

Overall, I cannot recommend Karan and Stacey highly enough. If you are looking for an estate agent who is professional, knowledgeable, and truly cares about their clients, then look no further. Thank you, Karan and Stacey, for all your hard work and support – you have made my rental experience a truly positive one!

Granville J

Great

4.8 out of 5

DEDICATED SPECIALIST NEGOTIATOR

PROFESSIONAL PHOTOS & FLOOR PLANS

MULTI AWARD-WINNING AGENCY

Discover more about what we do

Property Management

Property management is a core element of our business. We look after properties for buy-to-let investors; homeowners who are temporarily relocating; wealth and asset managers; expats and trust companies.

I want to know more

New Homes

Our new homes team know every development in the city centre and Jewellery Quarter, we have worked with developers through the planning stages over the years and helped sell in excess of 30 million pounds worth of property.

Im interested in a New Build

Landlord Guide

Our experience with local hospitals and businesses has awarded us exceptional knowledge about both best practice and the local area, so you know that we have everything covered.

Download this guide

Vendor Guide

We know that moving can be a stressful time, so we’ve put together a quick guide, just to let you know what’ll be happening throughout the application and moving in stages.

Download this guide

Our Area Guides

Jewellery Quarter

Life in the Quarter

Steeped in history, the Jewellery Quarter is one of Birmingham's most vibrant and lively locations.

St Pauls Sqaure

Georgian Square

In the heart of Birmingham's iconic Jewellery Quarter district, St. Paul's Square is the last remaining one of its kind in the entire city.

Colmore Row

Most Prestigious Business Area

Colmore Row is a street in the centre of Birmingham, England, running from Victoria Square to just beyond Snow Hill station.

Birmingham City Centre

The Heart of Birmingham City Centre

Bullring is the glamorous heart of Birmingham with over 160 imaginative and desirable shops to explore.

Harborne

Harborne Village

Harborne is packed full of independent stores, boutique shops and a cosmopolitan array of bars and eateries.

Edgbaston

Most Affluent Suburban Area

Edgbaston is an affluent suburban area of central Birmingham, England, curved around the southwest of the city centre.

Moseley Village

Moseley Village

Moseley Village has a strong identity as a creative place making it a desired place to visit.

Digbeth

Coolest Neighbourhood in Britain

Digbeth is one of the most distinctive parts of the city and recently named the Coolest Neighbourhood in Britain by the Sunday Times

King’s Heath

18th Century Village

An 18th century village come city suburb, King's Heath is charming little town brimming with independent quirks.

Sutton Coldfield

The Royal Town

The Royal Town of Sutton Coldfield has long been one of the most sought after suburbs in Birmingham.

Solihull

The Country Life

Solihull is rich with parks and walks, National Trust properties and gastropubs.

Latest News

2026 UK house price predictions

30th April 2026

Our 2026 UK house price predictions

Key takeaways:

Our property experts predict that new seller asking prices will rise by 2% by the end of 2026
House price growth will differ depending on region, with lower-priced Scotland, Wales and northern England markets expected to see stronger growth, whilst London house prices could lag behind
It’s a more positive year for first-time buyers, thanks to ...

Read article

The Renters’ Rights Bill 2025: A Comprehensive Guide for Landlords and Tenants

2nd December 2025

The Renters’ Rights Bill 2025 represents the most significant overhaul of the private rented sector in the UK in over thirty years. Once enacted, it will deliver greater protection and flexibility for tenants while introducing new obligations and procedural requirements for landlords.
At LV PROPERTY, we are committed to keeping our clients fully informed and prepared for these changes. Below is a ...

Read article

Your local property team

We aim to build long standing relationships with our clients, giving honest advice and excellent customer service along the way. Each and every one of our employees represents the spirit of our company. Our highly experienced team consists of estate agents in Birmingham, who live and work in this great city. Whether you are looking to buy, sell, let or invest, our team of experts will be very happy to assist.

Saturday – 10:00 – 14:00

Award-winning Estate Agents In Birmingham

ENQUIRE

Jeniffer Hernandez

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

A graduate of the University of Medellin, Colombia, with a degree in International Business, Jeniffer Hernandez brings a wealth of expertise and a passion for excellence to her role at LV PROPERTY. As a key player in implementing strategic initiatives, Jeniffer focuses on refining systems and procedures to ensure exceptional customer service is consistently delivered.

In addition to her strategic acumen, Jeniffer’s creative talents shine as a skilled property photographer, expertly showcasing our portfolio to attract and inspire clients. Outside of work, she enjoys exploring new destinations and culinary adventures, bringing a vibrant and dynamic perspective to everything she does.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Stacey Wallace

Stacey Wallace brings a wealth of experience and expertise to her role as Senior Lettings Negotiator at LV PROPERTY. Passionate about both property and people, Stacey thrives on connecting clients with their ideal homes and ensuring landlords achieve the best possible outcomes for their investments.

With a commitment to delivering exceptional customer service, Stacey's personable approach and in-depth knowledge of the local market have earned her the trust and respect of clients and colleagues alike. She takes pride in building lasting relationships, keeping communication clear and proactive, and ensuring every step of the lettings process is seamless and stress-free.

Dedicated to excellence, Stacey consistently goes the extra mile to create positive experiences for tenants and landlords, making her a valued asset to the LV PROPERTY team.

T: 0121 285 7575 (Option 2)
Email me directly

Jaspal Singh

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Jaspal Singh, the visionary CEO and Co-Founder of LV PROPERTY, launched the group in 2009 with a mission to redefine the property experience through innovation, excellence, and an unwavering focus on customer satisfaction. Combining his entrepreneurial spirit with a passion for people, technology, and property, Jaspal has built a forward-thinking company that delivers outstanding results across all markets.

Jaspal’s journey in property began at just 21, when he purchased his first investment property fresh out of university. His early experiences as a buyer, seller, and landlord revealed significant gaps in the market, inspiring him to create a property group that simplifies processes while putting customers first. This customer-centric ethos became the foundation of LV PROPERTY’s success and reputation.

Under Jaspal’s leadership, LV PROPERTY has grown into a dynamic business, blending cutting-edge technology with a human touch to provide exceptional service. With an infectious enthusiasm for innovation and a deep understanding of the property market, Jaspal continues to lead the team with energy, creativity, and a relentless drive to achieve excellence.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Hamad Al Qubaisi

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Originally from London, Hamad Ali relocated to Birmingham in 2009 and has since become a seasoned professional in the sales and lettings industry. With over 15 years of experience, Hamad now leads the office at LV PROPERTY, bringing a wealth of knowledge, expertise, and a commitment to delivering outstanding results for clients.

Hamad’s dedication to excellence and customer service drives his success in creating seamless property experiences for landlords, tenants, buyers, and sellers alike. His approachable and solutions-focused leadership style ensures that both clients and colleagues feel supported and valued.

Outside of work, Hamad is an avid traveler who enjoys immersing himself in new cultures and perspectives. A keen cricketer and active community member, he also loves socializing with friends and staying connected to the vibrant life of Birmingham. Hamad’s dynamic approach and passion for what he does make him a true asset to the LV PROPERTY team.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Corrine Cook

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Corrine Cook brings a wealth of management experience to LV PROPERTY and is passionate about delivering exceptional customer service. Highly organised, driven, and results-focused, she plays a key role in ensuring the smooth running of the office while supporting landlords, tenants, buyers, and sellers throughout their property journey.

Known for her proactive approach and strong communication skills, Corrine is committed to maintaining high standards and creating positive experiences for every client.

Outside of work, Corrine enjoys travelling and spending quality time in nature with her family.

T: 0121 285 7575 (option 3)
Email me directly

Shanique Finch

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Shanique is part of the Administration Team. Using her previous customer service experience, she aims to provide the best service and experience for everybody who deals with her and the business with her friendly and energetic approach. Outside of work she enjoys spending time with friends and family.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Thomas Markham

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT US

With over 10 years' experience in the property industry, Tom is a trusted and knowledgeable Sales & Lettings Consultant who is dedicated to delivering outstanding results. His customer-first approach, honest advice and attention to detail have earned him a reputation for providing a professional and reliable service.

Whether helping clients buy, sell, let or rent, Tom is committed to going the extra mile to ensure every transaction is handled smoothly, making the process as straightforward and stress-free as possible.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Maria lopez

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Graduating with First-Class Honours in Marketing and Brand Management from Colombia, Maria Lopez began an exciting journey that has taken her across Europe, including Barcelona, where she worked with some of the top five marketing agencies. These experiences honed her expertise in crafting innovative campaigns and driving brand success on a global scale.

Joining LV PROPERTY has been a thrilling chapter in her career, offering the perfect platform to grow alongside a forward-thinking company. Passionate about transforming ideas into impactful results, Maria brings a creative edge to the team, consistently elevating the LV PROPERTY brand across the West Midlands.

Her drive, creativity, and dedication to excellence are instrumental in building a strong and recognizable brand presence, ensuring LV PROPERTY continues to lead the way in the competitive property market.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

Vikash Bidral

Vikash is passionate about helping people find a place they are proud to call home. With a friendly, approachable manner and a genuine commitment to delivering outstanding customer service, he works tirelessly to make every client's moving journey as smooth and stress-free as possible.

Whether assisting first-time renters, experienced tenants or landlords looking to let their property, Vikash understands that every move is unique. He takes the time to listen, understand individual requirements and match applicants with homes that suit their lifestyle, budget and aspirations.

From the first enquiry through to handing over the keys, Vikash is dedicated to providing clear communication, honest advice and exceptional attention to detail. His proactive approach ensures applicants are kept informed throughout the process, while landlords benefit from professional marketing, prompt feedback and a high level of service.

As part of the LV PROPERTY team, Vikash specialises in residential lettings, accompanied viewings, applicant matching and property marketing. His enthusiasm, professionalism and commitment to exceeding expectations have helped many tenants find their perfect home and given landlords confidence that their property is in safe hands.

T: 01212857575
Email me directly

Rosie Garcha

Rosie is an experienced Property Manager at LV PROPERTY, recognised for her strong commitment to customer service and delivering results. With a wealth of industry knowledge, she expertly balances the needs of landlords and tenants, ensuring every property is managed to the highest standard.

Her proactive and detail-driven approach allows Rosie to anticipate challenges and provide effective solutions, fostering long-term trust and confidence among clients. She takes pride in her ability to communicate clearly, build strong relationships, and consistently exceed expectations.

With customer service at the heart of everything she does, Rosie ensures every client receives a seamless, professional, and positive experience. Her dedication, reliability, and passion for property management make her a valuable member of the LV PROPERTY team.

T: 01212857575
Email me directly

Katie McGarr

With extensive experience in property management, Katie brings a wealth of knowledge and professionalism to LV PROPERTY. Known for her hands-on approach and deep understanding of the lettings and management process, she consistently delivers outstanding results for landlords and tenants alike.

Katie is highly organised and proactive, ensuring every property under her care is managed with efficiency and attention to detail. Her ability to build strong relationships, combined with her problem-solving skills, makes her a trusted and reliable point of contact for clients.

Dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of service, Katie takes pride in resolving challenges quickly and effectively, fostering confidence and peace of mind for those she works with.

Outside of work, Katie enjoys spending time with family and friends, recharging for her busy and dynamic role.

T: 01212857575
Email me directly

Edwin Phillips

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT ME

Edwin brings a wealth of expertise to his role at LV PROPERTY, overseeing invoicing and payment processing with precision and efficiency. With a solid foundation in banking and finance, backed by five years of industry experience, Edwin ensures that all transactions run smoothly and that our clients and contractors are paid promptly.

Known for his meticulous attention to detail and proactive approach, Edwin takes pride in maintaining the financial operations that support our business. His professionalism and commitment to excellence ensure seamless processes and foster trust with both clients and partners.

Edwin’s enthusiasm for numbers and dedication to delivering exceptional service make him a vital member of the LV PROPERTY team.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

The Support Team

A LITTLE BIT ABOUT US

At LV PROPERTY, we are the team working tirelessly behind the scenes to ensure all our systems run smoothly and efficiently. Our role is to support the front office in delivering exceptional service, enabling us to maintain our position as market leaders in the property industry.

From streamlining processes to coordinating with our client-facing teams daily, we are dedicated to upholding the high standards LV PROPERTY is known for. Our mission is to ensure that every detail is managed meticulously, so our clients—whether landlords, tenants, buyers, or sellers—receive the best possible service at every touchpoint.

While we may work in the background, our impact is felt across everything we do, reinforcing LV PROPERTY’s commitment to excellence and innovation in the property market.

T: 0121 285 7575
Email me directly

“Voted Best Estate Agent in the West Midlands”

Welcome to the home of a multi award-winning estate agency , recognised for excellence across sales, lettings and property management. We are proud to have been named “Best Estate Agent” in the West Midlands at the prestigious The ESTAS Awards , along with recognition at the BUILD Real Estate & Property Awards 2019 . These achievements reflect our unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional service and are only possible благодаря the continued trust and support of our valued clients.

We are also delighted to have received multiple honours at the SME Midlands Enterprise Awards , including:

Best Independent Property Management – West Midlands (2021)

Best Lettings & Sales Agents – Birmingham (2022)

Best Boutique Estate & Lettings Agency – West Midlands (2023)

In addition, our digital presence has been recognised at the UK Property Awards 2024–2025 , where we were awarded Real Estate Agency Website – United Kingdom , highlighting our commitment to innovation and client experience.

LV PROPERTY is an independent agency providing a highly personalised service across property sales, lettings and management. Our approach is centred on delivering exceptional results through tailored advice, market expertise and a genuine understanding of our clients’ individual requirements. Our dedicated city centre specialists work closely with each client to ensure a seamless and professional experience from start to finish.

Sales

We have been successfully selling houses and apartments across Birmingham City Centre and the Jewellery Quarter for many years. Over this time, we have developed an in-depth understanding of the local market — from individual streets and developments to buyer behaviour and pricing strategy. Most importantly, we understand what it takes to deliver both outstanding results and a first-class client experience.

As a boutique agency with specialist expertise, our highly trained team has consistently achieved exceptional outcomes, including securing 100% of the asking price for our sellers over the past 18 months . We have also facilitated a substantial volume of high-value property transactions within the city and have established a trusted international private buyers’ network, enabling us to connect our clients with motivated and qualified purchasers.

Lettings & Property Management

Our lettings and property management team is dedicated to sourcing high-quality, professional tenants for our landlords’ properties. We take the time to understand the specific needs of both landlords and applicants, enabling us to deliver a tailored and efficient matching process.

We pride ourselves on providing a service that is professional, approachable and detail-focused, ensuring every client and applicant feels confident and supported throughout the process. By combining market knowledge with a proactive and personalised approach, we are able to consistently deliver reliable tenants, strong occupancy levels and long-term relationships built on trust.

Professional touch ⭐

Alongside our professionalism and expertise, we pride ourselves on being a boutique agency that delivers a truly personalised, five-star service. With three strategically located offices across Birmingham City Centre , Edgbaston and the Jewellery Quarter , and a dedicated team of 10 experienced professionals, we offer the perfect balance of personal attention and proven capability.

We are intentionally not a large, faceless organisation. Instead, we focus on building genuine relationships with our clients, ensuring you work closely with a familiar and knowledgeable team throughout your buying, selling or renting journey. Our size allows us to remain agile, attentive and highly responsive, while maintaining the highest standards of service.

Our offices are open Monday to Friday 09:00 – 17:30 and Saturday 10:00 – 14:00 , with Sunday and evening appointments available by arrangement , providing flexibility to suit your schedule. We aim to make the process as convenient and stress-free as possible, working around your availability rather than expecting you to work around ours.

24/7 Online Booking & Viewing System

We are proud to be one of the first agents in the UK to introduce a fully integrated 24/7 online booking system—designed for speed, convenience, and a seamless customer experience.

Whether you are a landlord, seller, or tenant, you can book valuations and viewings instantly, at any time of day. No delays, no back-and-forth—just a simple, efficient process that works around you.

Tenants can secure viewing appointments directly with our property consultants, while landlords and sellers can arrange valuations within seconds. Every booking is automatically scheduled into our system in real time, with instant confirmation—ensuring nothing is missed and everything runs smoothly.

This technology allows us to respond faster, reduce void periods, and maximise opportunities for our clients—while delivering the level of service modern customers expect.

Marketing Exposure

Our marketing team is the best in the business. When we take on a new property, we don’t just list it — we launch it. Your property is showcased across all major portals including Rightmove , Zoopla and OnTheMarket , enhanced with Premium and Featured listings to maximise visibility and drive serious enquiries.

From professional photography and immersive virtual viewings to detailed 3D floor plans, every element is designed to make your property stand out. Our approach ensures maximum exposure, stronger interest, and the best possible outcome.

Award-Winning Agency 🏆

We are an award-winning agency built on a simple principle – exceptional customer service delivers exceptional results. Our reputation has been earned through consistently going above and beyond for our clients, providing a level of care, communication and professionalism that sets us apart from the competition.

Property is more than just transactions; it’s about people, trust and delivering on promises. Our experienced team combines in-depth market knowledge with a proactive, hands-on approach, ensuring every client receives clear advice, honest guidance and a seamless experience from start to finish.

We pride ourselves on responsiveness, transparency and attention to detail. Whether you are selling, letting or investing, you can expect a dedicated team focused on achieving the best possible outcome for you and your property.

Our results speak for themselves – industry recognition, loyal clients and long-term relationships built on trust. When you work with us, you are choosing a team committed to delivering service at the highest level.

Training 🎓

We invest heavily in the development of our people, delivering intensive and continuous training across every level of the business at our dedicated training facilities within our head office. Before working in any of our branches, all team members complete a structured training programme designed to uphold our exceptionally high standards of customer service.

This commitment to professional development ensures our clients receive knowledgeable advice, consistent communication and a seamless experience at every stage. By equipping our team with the skills, expertise and customer-focused mindset we expect, we are able to deliver service of the highest quality, every time.

Fully Regulated

We are a fully regulated agency, giving our clients complete confidence that they are working with a professional, compliant and accountable business. We are members of a Client Money Protection (CMP) scheme , ensuring that all client funds are safeguarded and handled in accordance with strict regulatory standards.

In addition, we are regulated by the Property Redress Scheme (PRS) for both sales and lettings, providing our clients with an independent route for resolution and further reassurance that we operate with transparency, integrity and professionalism at all times.

More details can be found at www.theprs.co.uk .

Your local property team

We aim to build long standing relationships with our clients, giving honest advice and excellent customer service along the way. Each and every one of our employees represents the spirit of our company. Our highly experienced team consists of estate agents in Birmingham, who live and work in this great city. Whether you are looking to buy, sell, let or invest, our team of experts will be very happy to assist.
